prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Terminations & splices, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: insufficient torque (thermal signature - IR modality). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 110.14.
title: Identification: Terminations & splices (commercial project)
